title: Front Office Manager - Jubilant FoodWorks - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Jubilant FoodWorks - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks:
Jubilant FoodWorks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
